name: Chocolate Pound Cake with Butter Cream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and margarine until smooth.
2. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine dry ingredients, and add to creamed mixture alternately with milk and vanilla.
5. Spoon batter into a well-greased 10-inch tube pan or Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes; reduce heat to 200°F and bake an additional 35-40 minutes.
7. Cool, spread with Butter Cream Frosting, and decorate as desired.
Butter Cream Frosting:
1. Cream margarine and cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Add salt and sugar, a small amount at a time, beating until smooth.
3. Slowly beat in just enough milk to make the mixture spreadable; add vanilla.
